No Poverty.reason: The course mentions 'social responsibility' but lacks direct or strong inferred links to specific poverty eradication targets or actions.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture practices.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or inferred content related to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly contributes to tertiary education (Target 4.3) and focuses on developing technical skills for employment (Target 4.4) through big data analysis.

Gender Equality.reason: The course syllabus provides no explicit or inferred content related to gender equality, women's empowerment, or addressing discrimination.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course syllabus lacks any explicit or inferred content related to affordable, clean energy, or energy efficiency.
